unresolved.title: Love and Deepspace 'bring back Valko' petition surpasses 229k signatures
unresolved.summary:
A fan petition has called on Infold Games and Paper Games to restore Valko as a love interest in Love and Deepspace following the character's removal from the game amid controversy in China.

Fans in China had complained about the character's introduction over a number of issues, including links to the number '731', which has links to the real-world Imperial Japanese Army Unit 731 that conducted human experiments during the Second World War. ... [ MORE ]

unresolved.title: Three Games From The NAG Winter Edition 2026 You Can Pick Up On Sale Today
unresolved.summary:
There are few things more dangerous than reading about cool games and then immediately discovering that those same games are currently on sale. With the NAG Winter Edition 2026 now out in the wild, we figured this was the perfect time to highlight three games featured in the magazine that you can grab on Steam today for less. Whether you’re in the mood for rhythm-fuelled revenge, sneaky co-op heists, or a coming-of-age gut punch wrapped in an excellent soundtrack, these […] 
 The post  Three Games From The NAG Winter Edition 2026 You Can Pick Up On Sale Today  appeared first on  NAG .

unresolved.title: Wuthering Waves concert tour expands to Los Angeles after selling out in Asia
unresolved.summary:
Wuthering Waves Concert Tour: To the New World is heading to Los Angeles following sold-out performances across Asia.

After concerts in Asia from July to September, the move is intended to bring the live music experience to North American fans for the first time. The US concert will take place at the Peacock Theatre on October 17th, 2026. ... [ MORE ]
